description: D-026 Phase 1B-3 启动前置条件：Customer >= 5 MIGRATABLE / Project >= 5 MIGRATABLE / 至少 5 个 MIGRATABLE Project 关联到本轮 MIGRATABLE Customer / Model >= 10 MIGRATABLE / Makeup >= 10 MIGRATABLE. Migration pilot MUST NOT start until ALL thresholds are met.
judgement: FAIL — One or more D-026 thresholds not met. MIGRATION_PILOT_001 MUST NOT start. Either MIGRATABLE counts are short, or fewer than 5 MIGRATABLE projects link to MIGRATABLE customers in this batch.
